1.1: Dan lepok kan bann ziz gouvern Israel # 1:1 Bann ziz ti pe gouverne apepre 1100 avan Z. K., lir liv Ziz. , ena enn lafaminn dan pei. Enn zom pe res Betleem dan rezion Zida. Li pran so fam ek so de garson e zot al res dan pei Moab.
1.2: Misie la apel Elimelek e so fam apel Naomi. Zot de garson apel Malonn ek Kilionn. Zot fer parti klan Efrata. Kan zot ariv dan pei Moab, zot etabli laba.
1.3: Me Elimelek, mari Naomi, mor dan pei Moab. Naomi res tousel avek so de garson.
1.4: Plitar, toulede garson marye ar bann tifi Moabit. Enn apel Orpa ek lot la apel Rit. Apepre dizan plitar,
1.5: Malonn ek Kilionn osi mor. Naomi res tousel, san mari ni zanfan.
1.6: Dan pei Moab, Naomi tann dir ki LESEGNER finn beni so pep avek bann bon rekolt. Alor, li ek so bann belfi desid pou kit sa pei la.
1.7: Zot kit landrwa kot zot pe reste e zot pran larout ansam pou retourn dan Zida.
1.8: Me, dan sime, Naomi dir so bann belfi: “Asterla, retourn lakaz zot mama. Zot finn touzour fidel anver bann ki finn mor e anver mwa. LESEGNER ava bon avek zot osi.
1.9: Ki LESEGNER beni zot e fer zot trouv enn lot dimoun. Koumsa, sakenn ava gagn so prop menaz.” Apre sa, Naomi anbras zot. Me toulede koumans kriye e plore for-for.
1.10: Zot dir Naomi: “Non, nou anvi retourn avek twa, parmi to pep.”
1.11: Me Naomi redir zot: “Ale! Retourne mo bann tifi. Kifer zot anvi swiv mwa? Eski zot panse mo ankor kapav gagn zanfan ki pou marye ar zot # 1:11 Ti ena enn koutim: kan enn mari mor san zanfan, so frer ti bizin marye avek so fam pou donn li enn desandan. ?
1.12: Non, mo tro vie pou sa. Retourn kot zot! Apretou, mem si mo ti kapav remarye e gagn zanfan zordimem,
1.13: eski zot ti pou kapav atann ziska ki bann garson la grandi? Non, mo bann tifi, LESEGNER finn rann mo lavi amer. Li finn pini mwa, me pa zot. Mo sor pou tro dir pou zot.”
1.14: Letan bannla tann sa, toulede plor ankor pli for. Landernie, Orpa fini par anbras so belmer pou dir li orevwar. Me Rit pa oule kit so belmer enn pous.
1.15: Naomi dir li: “Get to belser finn ale. Li finn retourn parmi so pep e avek so bann bondie. Kifer to pa retourn avek li twa osi?”
1.16: Me Rit dir li: “Napa fors mwa pou kit twa napa anpes mwa swiv twa! Kot to pou ale, mo pou ale; kot to pou reste, mo pou reste; to pep pou osi mo pep, to Bondie pou osi mo Bondie.
1.17: La kot to pou mor, labamem mwa osi mo pou mor. La kot to pou antere, labamem mwa osi mo pou antere. Ki LESEGNER pini mwa si mo bizin kit twa. Zis lamor ki pou separ nou!”
1.18: Naomi trouve ki so belfi ti finn fini desid pou swiv li. Lerla li aret persiste ar li.
1.19: Alor, zot toulede marse ziska ki zot ariv Betleem. Letan zot ariv laba, tou dimoun dan vilaz gagn enn gran lazwa akoz zot. Bann fam pe dir ant zot: “Ala Naomi!”
1.20: Me Naomi dir zot: “Aret apel mwa Naomi # 1:20 Naomi, an Ebre, vedir erez. , apel mwa Mara # 1:20 Mara, an Ebre, vedir ranpli ar lamertim. , parski Bondie Toupwisan finn rann mo lavi bien amer.
1.21: Mo ti ale lame plin, me LESEGNER finn retourn mwa lame vid. Kifer zot kontign apel mwa Naomi? Zot pa trouve LESEGNER finn fer mwa ditor? Bondie Toupwisan finn fer mwa gagn maler lor maler.”
1.22: Ala ki manier Naomi kit pei Moab avek so belfi Rit, ki enn Moabit. Zot retourn Betleem dan komansman sezon rekolt dible.

2.1: Naomi ena enn fami dekote so mari Elimelek. Li apel Boaz. Li bien ris e dimoun bien respekte li.
2.2: Enn zour, Rit ki enn Moabit, dir so belmer Naomi: “Les mo al dan karo. Kikfwa mo kapav gagn sans zwenn kikenn ki ava permet mwa ramas zepi lorz ki bann travayer kit deryer zot”. Naomi dir li: “Ale mo tifi.”
2.3: Vremem, Rit al dan enn karo. Li ramas bann zepi ki bann travayer pe kit deryer. Li pa kone si sa karo la pou Boaz, fami Elimelek.
2.4: Plitar dan lazourne, Boaz sorti Betleem e li vinn dan karo. Li dir so bann travayer: “LESEGNER avek zot.” Bannla reponn: “LESEGNER beni twa.”
2.5: Letan Boaz trouv Rit, li dimann formenn ki ansarz bann travayer: “Kisannla sa zenn fam la?”
2.6: Formenn la reponn: “Enn zenn Moabit. Limem ki finn vinn ansam ar Naomi depi pei Moab.
2.7: Li finn dimann permision pou ramas bann zepi ki bann travayer kit deryer zot. Depi gramatin boner li la, lor so lipie. Ziska ler li pa finn pran okenn repo.”
2.8: Lerla Boaz al dir Rit: “Ekoute mo tifi, pa bizin al ramas zepi lorz dan karo enn lot dimoun. Res isi avek bann zenn fam ki travay dan mo karo.
2.9: Get bien ki kote bannla pe rekolte e swiv zot. Mo finn donn lord mo bann zom pou les twa trankil. Si to swaf, al pran dilo dan barik ki mo bann serviter finn ranpli.”
2.10: Letan Rit tann sa, li prostern li divan Boaz ziska ki so figir tous later. Lerla li dir: “Kifer to bon koumsa avek mwa alor ki mo enn etranze?”
2.11: Boaz dir li: “Dimoun finn rakont mwa tou seki to finn fer pou to belmer depi lamor to mari. To finn kit to papa ek to mama ek later kot to finn ne. To finn aksepte pou viv parmi enn pep ki to pa ti kone avan.
2.12: LESEGNER ava rekonpans twa pou tousala. To finn vinn rod proteksion LESEGNER, Bondie Izrael. Li ava donn twa so benediksion anabondans.”
2.13: Rit dir Boaz: “To finn ena enn gran bonte pou mwa, Met. To bann bon parol rekonfort mo leker. Dedir mo pa mem enn to bann servant.”
2.14: Dan ler dezene, Boaz dir Rit: “Vinn manz avek nou. Pran dipin e tranp li dan lasos.” Rit vinn asiz ansam ar bann travayer. Boaz donn li enn pla pistas griye. Rit manze ziska ki li rasazie. Li pa kapav fini so manze.
2.15: Kan Rit retourn dan karo pou ramas zepi lorz, Boaz donn lord tou so bann travayer: “les li ramas lorz mem ant bann pake zepi ki finn fini atase. Pa bizin anpes li.
2.16: Kan zot koup bann zepi, pa ezite pou kit inpe anba. Les li ramase. Pa bizin zot kriy ar li.”
2.17: Rit ramas lorz dan karo ziska tanto. Lerla, li tap bann zepi la pou grenn tou bann lagrin. Li reysi gagn enn gro sak, anviron 30 kilo lorz # 2:17 An Ebre, enn “efa” egal anviron 30 kilo. .
2.18: Lerla li pran so sak lorz e li retourn dan vilaz. Li montre so belmer ki kantite lorz li finn ramase. Apre sa li donn so belmer manze ki ti reste dan so dezene.
2.19: Naomi dimann li: “Kot to finn gagn tousala? Dan ki karo to finn ramas tou sa lorz la? Bondie ava beni sa dimoun ki finn bon anver twa la.” Lerla Rit rakont so belmer e li dir li: “Mo finn ramas dible dan karo enn misie ki apel Boaz.”
2.20: Naomi dir Rit: “LESEGNER ava beni sa dimoun la! LESEGNER pe kontign montre nou so bonte. Pa zis nou, ki vivan, me osi bann ki finn mor.” Lerla Naomi dir Rit: “Boaz enn fami avek nou. Li parmi bann ki sipoze ed nou.”
2.21: Rit, enn Moabit, dir so belmer: “Boaz finn donn mwa permision pou ramas lorz ansam ar bann zenn fam ki travay dan so karo ziska rekolt fini.”
2.22: Lerla Naomi dir Rit: “Bien bon mo tifi, res avek bann servant Boaz. Si to al dan enn lot karo, to riske al gagn maltrete.”
2.23: Alor, Rit kontign ramas lorz deryer bann servant Boaz. Li ramas lorz ek dible ziska rekolt fini. Rit kontigne res kot so belmer Naomi.

3.1: Enn zour, Naomi dir Rit: “Mo tifi, mo bizin ed twa trouv enn dimoun. Koumsa, to pou ena to prop menaz e li pou ava fer to boner.
3.2: To konn nou fami, Boaz. Limem ti les twa travay avek so bann servant. Zordi-swar li pou taminn lorz dan so plantasion.
3.3: Bengn twa, met to pli bon linz ek parfim twa. Apre sa, to al dan landrwa kot li pe taminn lorz. Me res kasiet ziska ki li fini manze-bwar.
3.4: Kan li pou al dormi, get bien dan ki plas li ete. Lerla, to ale, san fer tapaz, to dekouver so lipie # 3:4 Dapre koutim sa lepok la, kan enn fam ti dekouver lipie enn zom, sa ti vedir ki fam la ti pe rod proteksion zom la. e to alonz twa lamem. Limem li pou dir twa ki bizin fer.”
3.5: Rit dir so belmer: “Mo pou fer tou seki to finn dir mwa.”
3.6: Alor Rit al dan landrwa kot Boaz pe taminn lorz. Li fer exakteman seki so belmer ti dir li.
3.7: Kan Boaz fini manze-bwar, li ti dan enn bon mood. Li al dormi kot enn ta lagrin ti anpile. Alor Rit ale, san fer okenn tapaz, li glis li anba dra kot lipie Boaz.
3.8: Omilie lanwit, somey Boaz kase! Li gagn sok letan li trouv enn fam pe dormi kot so lipie.
3.9: Li dimande: “Kisannla twa?” Rit reponn: “Mwa sa, Rit, to servant. Mo finn vinn rod to proteksion, parski to enn fami pros. To ena enn responsabilite anver mwa.”
3.10: Boaz dir li: “Ki LESEGNER beni twa, mo tifi. To ti montre to fidelite anver fami to belmer, me sann-fwa la, to finn montre enn pli gran fidelite ankor. To pa finn al rod zenn-zenn garson, ki zot ris ouswa pov.
3.11: Pa bizin to trakase, mo pou fer tou seki kapav pou rann twa erez. Tou dimoun dan pei kone ki to enn fam drwat.
3.12: Wi, li vre ki mo enn fami pros e mo ena enn devwar anver twa. Me ena enn lot misie ki pli pros ek to fami ki mwa.
3.13: Res lamem pou sa lanwit la. Dime gramatin nou ava gete si li oule pran to responsabilite kouma enn fami pros. Si li aksepte, les limem fer li. Si li pa aksepte, mo promet divan LESEGNER ki mo pou pran to responsabilite momem. Ale! Dormi lamem ziska gramatin.”
3.14: Rit dormi kot lipie Boaz ziska gramatin. Me li lev boner, avan mem ki lizour fer, pou ki personn pa remark li. Boaz dir: “personn pa bizin kone si enn fam finn vinn isi.”
3.15: Avan ki Rit ale, Boaz dir li: “Amenn to manto e trap li bien.” Boaz ranpli manto la ar apepre 15 kilo lorz e li met li lor ledo Rit. Lerla, Rit retourn dan vilaz.
3.16: Rit al direk ar so belmer. Naomi dimann li: “kouma sa finn pase, mo tifi?” Lerla, Rit rakont tou seki Boaz finn fer pou li.
3.17: Rit dir: “Li finn mem ofer mwa sa 15 kilo lorz la. Li pa ti anvi mo retourn kot mo belmer lame vid.”
3.18: Naomi dir Rit: “Pran pasians mo tifi. Biento nou pou kone ki pe rezerve pou twa. Mo sir ki lespri Boaz pa pou trankil tanki li pa fini okip tousala zordimem.”

4.1: Boaz al asiz lor laplas piblik, kot laport lavil. Anmemtan, sa lot fami pros avek Elimelek la pase. Limem ki Boaz ti koz avek Rit. Boaz dir li: “Bonzour kamarad! Vinn asiz inpe!” Vremem, li vinn asize.
4.2: Boaz invit osi dis Ansien dan lavil pou vinn asize, e zot aksepte.
4.3: Lerla, li dir ar fami pros Elimelek: “To kone ki Naomi finn retourne depi pei Moab. Li pe vann terin ki ti pou nou kouzin, Elimelek.
4.4: Mo pe dir twa sa parski tomem fami pli pros. To ena drwa aste li divan tou bann Ansien ek tou seki pe asize ansam avek nou la. Si to pou aste li, al fer li. Me si to pa pou aste li, fer mwa kone, parski momem deziem fami pli pros.” Fami pros la dir: “Mo dakor pou aste terin la.”
4.5: Lerla, Boaz dir li: “Si to aste sa terin la ar Naomi, to pou bizin osi marye avek Rit, sa vev Moabit la. Koumsa, leritaz la pou res dan fami so defin mari.”
4.6: Letan fami pros la tann sa, li dir: “Si sa pou koumsa, mo pa pou aste terin la. Sa pou al kre problem avek mo prop leritaz. Azir dan mo plas twa parski mo pa pou kapav pran sa responsabilite la.”
4.7: Ena enn koutim dan Izrael sa lepok la: Kan bann dimoun fer enn lavant ouswa sanz zot drwa proprieter, enn la tir enn kote savat e donn li lot dimoun la. Sa prouve ki lavant la, ouswa lesanz la, legal.
4.8: Akoz samem letan fami pros la dir Boaz aste terin la, li tir enn kote savat e li donn li.
4.9: Apre sa, Boaz dir bann Ansien ek tou dimoun ki la sa zour la: “Zordi zot tou temwin ki mo finn aste, avek Naomi, tou seki ti pou Elimelek ek so de garson Malonn ek Kilionn.
4.10: Mo finn osi aksepte pou marye ar Rit, vev Malonn ki sorti Moab. Koumsa, leritaz pou res dan fami defin la. Pou ena bann zanfan ki pou gard so nom vivan parmi so fami e dan lavil. Zot tou temwin pou sa osi.”
4.11: Ler Boaz fini koze, tou bann ki la dir: “Wi, nou tou temwin. LESEGNER ava beni sa fam ki pe rant dan to lakaz la. Li ava kouma Rasel ek Lea, bann fam Zakob, ki finn donn nesans pep Izrael. To rises ava ogmante dan klan Efrata, e to nom ava vinn renome dan Betleem.
4.12: LESEGNER ava donn twa boukou zanfan avek sa zenn fam la. To fami ava vinn kouma fami Perez, garson Tamar ek Zida.”
4.13: Alor, Boaz marye avek Rit e gagn relasion avek li. LESEGNER beni Rit e donn li enn garson.
4.14: Ler zanfan la ne, bann fam dan Betleem dir Naomi: “Anou remersi LESEGNER. Zordi, li finn donn twa enn desandan. Ki so nom vinn renome partou dan Izrael!
4.15: Sa zanfan la pou transform to lavi. Li pou ed twa dan to vie-zour. To belfi vo plis ki set garson pou twa, parski li kontan twa e li finn donn twa sa ti-zanfan la.”
4.16: Lerla, Naomi pran zanfan la e ser li dan so lebra. Limem pran responsabilite pou grandi zanfan la.
4.17: Bann fam dan vwazinaz pe krie: “Naomi finn gagn enn garson.” Zot apel li Obed. Plitar Obed vinn papa Zese, papa David.
4.18: Ala lalis bann zanset David depi Perez: Perez papa Ezronn.
4.19: Ezronn papa Ram, e Ram papa Aminadab.
4.20: Aminadab papa Nasonn e Nasonn papa Salomon.
4.21: Salomon papa Boaz, e Boaz papa Obed.
4.22: Obed papa Zese, e Zese papa David.
